description: Celestial paired-design 1:1 mirror between Solrock and Lunatone. Designer-coordinated Generation III pair: Ruby/Sapphire version-exclusive split, shared 'Meteorite Pokemon' classification, shared Meteor Falls origin, AND mechanical interlock — each card's primary Ability names the other and requires it in play to activate. Visual mirror reads as sun-disc-on-warm-desert-day vs crescent-moon-on-dark-void-night. Pair-node deferred at N=2; DAA-072 Lunatone enrichment + any subsequent Solrock corpus add will retrigger Nodeley evaluation.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-92 oracle text — Resistance Shade names Lunatone]
[PokemonTCG.io: sm3-68 oracle text — Heal Block names Solrock]
other_candidates_considered: Mr. Nodeley pair-node cards/_characters/solrock-lunatone-pair.md — rejected at N=2; corpus contains DAA-072 Lunatone (not yet enriched) which would push to N=3 and retrigger evaluation. The mechanical-interlock-plus-version-exclusive-pair argument is strong enough that this MAY warrant a node when the third corpus member enriches — flag in janitor_triage if not already there.
